executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The site uses async partial loading via fetch() for header and contact sections — wait at least 2000ms after page load before interacting with those elements. The calculator (#calculator-app) is fully JS-rendered, wait for it to have children. For cookie consent tests, clear localStorage key 'cd_cookie_consent' between runs. The server is a static file server at http://localhost:3000. Do NOT submit forms to the live n8n webhook — only test UI validation and state.
